# Reyco Marine & Small Engine Ltd. — Full Business Reference

> Source: reycomarine.com (verified May 2026).

---

## Business Identity

Name: Reyco Marine & Small Engine Ltd.
Type: Marine and outdoor power equipment dealer and service centre
Ownership: Locally owned and operated
Facility: 28,000 square feet, one continuous floor with integrated sales, parts, and service departments
Staff: 8 team members

Address: 11 White Oak Drive East, Sault Ste. Marie, ON P6B 4J7
Phone: (705) 253-7828
Email: parts.reycomarine@gmail.com
Website: https://reycomarine.com

Hours:
- Monday to Friday: 8 AM to 5 PM
- Saturday: 9 AM to 1 PM
- Sunday: Closed

## Staff

- Casey Davieaux — Owner / Sales
- Aaron — Co-Owner / Service Manager
- Lynn — Parts Manager
- Ron — Parts Specialist
- Lee — Marine and ATV Service Technician
- Damian — Small Engine Service Technician
- Cody — Marine and ATV Service Technician

## Service Area

Primary: Sault Ste. Marie, Ontario
Regional: Northern Ontario / Algoma District

---

## Marine Service

Reyco Marine is a Mercury and Princecraft authorized service centre. Factory-trained technicians use factory diagnostic tools. OEM parts are stocked on-site. Warranty claims for Mercury and Princecraft are filed in-house with no manufacturer shipping required.

Services offered:
- Computer diagnostics on outboard ECUs
- Carburettor rebuild and fuel system overhaul
- Lower unit and powerhead repair
- Written quote provided before any work begins
- Tank-tested or run-up tested before customer pickup

Turnaround times:
- Engine repair: 3 to 5 business days
- Spring commissioning: 2 to 4 business days (book March to May)
- Winterization: 1 to 2 business days (book October to November)

Trailer drop-off and customer pickup arrangements are both available. Reyco services boats regardless of where they were originally purchased.

### Spring Commissioning

Included in a standard spring commissioning:
- Battery installation or replacement with terminal cleaning and testing
- Fuel system inspection with fresh fuel, line and primer bulb checks
- Lower unit gear oil drain and refill
- Engine fluid top-ups or changes per Mercury service intervals
- Cooling system flush and water pump test
- Spark plug inspection and replacement as needed
- Prop inspection for damage and shaft seal condition
- Steering and control cable checks
- Electrical system verification (bilge pump, lights, gauges, charging circuit)
- Hull and trailer inspection
- Final water-ready test on muffs

Optional add-ons (quoted separately): prop repair, battery replacement, full detail, trailer service.

Pricing: quoted at intake based on engine configuration (single outboard, sterndrive, or twin engine). Call (705) 253-7828 with your boat make and engine model for a flat quote.

Best booking window: late February to mid-March. Late April through May typically books 2 to 3 weeks out.

### Winterization

Included in fall winterization:
- Fogging internal engine components
- Stabilising the fuel system
- Full water-system drainage and antifreeze
- 15-point diagnostic inspection

Book October to November for the shortest wait.

---

## Small Engine Repair

Equipment types serviced:
- Lawn mowers (push, self-propelled, riding, zero-turn)
- Snowblowers (single, two-stage, three-stage)
- Chainsaws and string trimmers
- Leaf blowers and pressure washers
- Generators and water pumps
- Most 2-stroke and 4-stroke gas engines under 30 hp

No appointment required for drop-off during business hours.

Turnaround times:
- Standard repairs: 3 to 5 business days
- Simple jobs (spark plug replacement, carburetor clean): same day when bench availability permits
- Written estimates provided before any work begins
- Equipment tested before customer pickup

Authorized warranty service for Echo, Cub Cadet, and Toro. Non-warranty service available for most other gas-powered small engine brands.

---

## Snowblower Service

Full snowblower maintenance and repair including:
- Full tune-ups
- Auger repair
- Shear-pin replacement
- Carburetor cleaning
- Belt and auger inspection
- Fuel stabilisation

Pre-season tune-up (September to November): 1 to 3 business days turnaround.
Standard repairs: 2 to 5 business days.
Walk-in counter stocks common shear pins for Cub Cadet and Toro — no appointment needed.

Pre-season booking is strongly recommended: service done in September means shortest wait times and lowest demand.

---

## Authorized Brands

### Marine

**Mercury** — Outboard engines. Authorized dealer and service centre. Factory diagnostic tools, OEM parts on-site, in-house warranty filing.

**Princecraft** — Aluminium fishing boats and family/pontoon boats. Authorized dealer and service centre. OEM parts, in-house warranty filing.

**Minn Kota** — Trolling motors and electric outboards.

**Humminbird** — Fish finders, depth sounders, and chartplotters.

**Cannon** — Downriggers for sport fishing.

### Outdoor Power Equipment

**Cub Cadet** — Riding mowers, zero-turn mowers, snowblowers. Authorized dealer and warranty service centre.

**Toro** — Push mowers, riding mowers, snowblowers. Authorized dealer and warranty service centre.

**Echo** — Chainsaws, string trimmers, leaf blowers, and handheld outdoor power equipment. Authorized dealer.

**E-Z-GO** — Utility vehicles and golf carts.

**Hisun** — ATVs and side-by-sides.

**R&J Machine** — Specialty equipment.

Stocks only (no product pages): Easy Hauler, trailers.

---

## Financing

Marine products: 60 to 180 month financing available.
Outdoor power equipment: 24 to 60 month financing available.
Trade-in programs accepted for boats, motors, trailers, and power equipment.

---

## What Makes Reyco Different

- Sault Ste. Marie's marine-first dealer: integrated sales, parts, and service under one roof
- Services equipment regardless of where it was originally purchased
- Written quotes before any work begins
- Factory-trained technicians with factory diagnostic tools
- OEM parts stocked on-site for faster turnaround
- In-house warranty filing for authorized brands (Mercury, Princecraft, Echo, Cub Cadet, Toro) — no shipping equipment to a manufacturer
